section.title: NAME
section.p: remove - delete the queried document set.

section.title: Examples
section.p: query from collection 'bar' where age is large than 10, and remove the documents satified the condition.

note.p: can not be called simultaneously with query.count(), query.remove().
sorting must use index when called with query.sort() in a single node.
query must be ensured to run in a single node or a singe sub-collection when query.update() is called simultaneously with query.limit() or query.skip() in cluster.
